docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-20-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT RUIZ, GRACE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT GRACE RUIZ IS PRESENT. AFTER FINAL ROLL CALL AND DISMISSING THIS MATTER W/O PREJUDICE, PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT IN COURTROOM. HOWEVER, A FEW MINUTES AFTER DEFENDANT VACATED THE COURTROOM, PLAINTIFF ENTERED THE COURTROOM INDICATING THEY WERE PRESENT IN THE HALLWAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
